seo.title: Jolan Chappaz — Tattoo Artist, Graphic Artist & Poet
seo.description: Jolan Chappaz — hand-poked tattoo artist, graphic artist and poet based between Geneva and Villars-sur-Ollon, Switzerland. Tattoos, paintings, poetry and artist books inspired by Swiss folk art.
seo.keywords: Jolan Chappaz, tattoo, hand poke, handpoke, Geneva, Switzerland, Swiss folk art, poetry, paintings, Nuit Noire Tattoo
